FileId.description: Upload the document via the /files endpoint first to get the FileId, or directly fill the FileUrl field

Fields.description: The fields to listen on for changes

Documents.description: A maximum of five documents are allowed. The first document is considered as the actual invoice

CostObjectNumber.description: Can only be filled by general ledger accounts with cost object type 'ServiceObject' and type 'ProfitOrLoss'/'Balance'. The service object must have sales status 'Sold'

InvoiceRelationCode.description: Only working when invoice relation entry is enabled in the Powerall sales order/work order/quotation settings

EntryNumber.description: Required when no minimum entry number is set in Powerall. Else, it will be automatically generated

RelationId.description: This field can either contain the relation code (numeric), or the relation id (guid)

InvoiceRelationId.description: This field can either contain the invoice relation code (numeric), or the invoice relation id (guid)

DeliveryAddressId.description: Either fill in this sequence number, or specify the delivery address per field

ApplyWebshopSettings.description: When true, specific webshop settings are applied to the order in Powerall

LineNumber.description: Either leave empty, or provide a contiguous sequence for explicit ordering

DiscountPercentage.description: Fill in with the AppliedDiscountPercentage from /products/prices, or leave empty, so that the API will calculate it for you

GrossPrice.description: Fill in with the CustomerGrossPriceExVat from /products/prices, or leave empty, so that the API will calculate it for you

ActualHours.description: Required when no start or end time is specified.

Fields.description: The fields to listen on for changes

ActualHours.description: Required when no start or end time is specified.

NextEmployeeCode.description: When Final is false, the employee that has to give the next approval. Otherwise, this field must be empty

Final.description: When false, the status of the invoice does not change. When true, the invoice becomes payable.

NextEmployeeCode.description: When Final is true, the employee that has to approve the invoice now. When Final is false, the employee that has to give the next fiat.

Final.description: When false, the status of the invoice does not change. When true, the invoice moves to the approval stage.

LineNumber.description: Either leave empty, or provide a contiguous sequence for explicit ordering

DiscountPercentage.description: Fill in with the AppliedDiscountPercentage from /products/prices, or leave empty, so that the API will calculate it for you

ActualHours.description: Required when no start or end time is specified.

basic.description: Authorization with tenant name and token
